pi_items.source: task.json description explicitly states 'Navigate to the course "Introduction to Chemistry" (CHEM101)' and setup_task.sh creates this course via PHP CLI
task.json description explicitly states 'Name: "Module 1: Lab Safety Fundamentals"'
task.json description explicitly states 'Name: "Module 2: Chemical Handling Procedures"'
task.json description explicitly states 'Name: "Module 3: Emergency Response Protocols"'

privileged_info_summary: The task involves creating a sequential learning path in a Moodle course with shortname CHEM101 titled 'Introduction to Chemistry'. Three Page activities must be created with completion dependencies: (1) 'Module 1: Lab Safety Fundamentals', (2) 'Module 2: Chemical Handling Procedures' restricted by Module 1 completion, and (3) 'Module 3: Emergency Response Protocols' restricted by Module 2 completion. All modules must have completion tracking enabled. The data is synthetic—the course and modules are created dynamically during task execution, not pre-existing. The environment uses Moodle 4.5 (MOODLE_405_STABLE) with MariaDB database, running on Apache at http://localhost/ (with DocumentRoot set to /var/www/html/moodle), using admin credentials admin/Admin1234!.
